p2p_enrich.notes: Added 2 repo_tests pass_to_pass checks: (1) test_repo_ruff_lint - runs 'ruff check areal/' from .github/workflows/format-check.yml, (2) test_repo_ruff_format - runs 'ruff format --check areal/'. CI commands discovered: ruff check/format from format-check.yml. pytest commands from test-areal.yml require GPU/torch so not included. Both p2p tests verified passing on base commit.
